title: E-Commerce Platform
description: A full-featured e-commerce platform with real-time inventory management.
longDescription: Built a scalable e-commerce solution featuring real-time inventory tracking, payment integration, and an admin dashboard. Implemented server-side rendering for optimal SEO and performance.

title: Real-Time Dashboard
description: Analytics dashboard with real-time data visualization and reporting.
longDescription: Developed a comprehensive analytics dashboard with real-time data streaming, interactive charts, and exportable reports. Features customizable widgets and role-based access.

title: Task Management App
description: Collaborative task management tool with real-time updates.
longDescription: Created a project management application featuring kanban boards, Gantt charts, time tracking, and team collaboration tools with real-time synchronization.

title: API Gateway Service
description: Microservices API gateway with rate limiting and authentication.
longDescription: Designed and implemented an API gateway for microservices architecture with rate limiting, JWT authentication, request logging, and service discovery.

title: AI Chat Application
description: Real-time AI-powered chat application with natural language processing.
longDescription: Built a chat application integrating LLM APIs for intelligent conversations, with streaming responses, conversation history, and multi-language support.

title: DevOps Pipeline Tool
description: CI/CD pipeline management tool with automated deployment workflows.
longDescription: Developed a DevOps tool for managing CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions integration, Docker containerization, automated testing, and deployment monitoring.
